{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Lindon's gift
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] received a bundle containing six fine swords.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11">''Blackflame'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
